notes: verifier-v1 is calibrated for resource-leak (acquire/release) patterns; missing-check (mc) seed mc-2 (kzalloc null-check missing in rtl8192_init_priv_variable, fix sha 09acf29c8246) cannot pass structural gates.

F1.acquire: POC needs both _buggy() and _fixed() each containing kzalloc => count=2, while seed slice has 1; per Stage A R1 the two-function structure is non-negotiable, so this mismatch is structural.
F5.return: seed slice has 2 returns (the seed fn implicit + main), POC has 3 (two fns + main); lenient_pass per cell prompt sec.3 only covers F2.if/F3.goto with |delta|<=1.
F2.if mismatch (delta=1) is itself within lenient bounds, but combined with the two hard mismatches the verifier still fails.
